zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Janet de Danielstoun於1330年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle23歲，母親Mary Fleming20歲。她於1348年與Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie結婚。她去世於1380年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Janet de Danielstoun于1330年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，她的父亲Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle23岁，母亲Mary Fleming20岁。她于1348年与Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie结婚。她去世于1380年在苏格兰雷福福爾享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Janet de Danielstoun was born in 1330, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, was 23 and her mother, Mary Fleming, was 20. She married Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie in 1348. She died in 1380, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Janet de Danielstoun est née en 1330, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary Fleming, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie en 1348. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Janet de Danielstoun 1330 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle 23 und ihre Mutter Mary Fleming 20. Sie hat 1348 Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie geheiratet. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Janet de Danielstoun è nata il nel 1330 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mary Fleming, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie nel 1348. Morì nel 1380, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Janet de Danielstounが1330年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castleは23歳，母Mary Flemingは20歳であった。1348年にSir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellieと結婚した。彼女は1380年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで50歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Janet de Danielstoun(이)가 1330년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Fleming(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1348년 Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1380년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Janet de Danielstoun nasceu em 1330, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mary Fleming, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie em 1348. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Janet de Danielstoun родилась в 1330 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Fleming, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie в 1348 г. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Janet de Danielstoun nació en 1330, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Danzielstoun - Governor of Dumbar Castle, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mary Fleming, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Adam Mure IV of Rowallan and Pokellie en 1348. Murió en 1380, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.
